document.title: XDAQ Block Diagram
document.revisionOrVersion: Rev1.0; sheet title blocks show Rev A and Rev B

sourceSummary.oneLine: Electrical schematic pages for an XDAQ module using an Artix-7 XC7A35 FPGA, B2B connectors, LVDS/MIPI interfaces, FPGA power, and power tree.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Design history file electrical design schematic reference.
keyPoints: The block diagram identifies an XDAQ Module built around Artix-7 XC7A35-2FGG484.
The page list includes BANK0/QSPI/JTAG, FPGA banks, B2B connectors JM1-JM4, FPGA power/GND, power tree, and LVDS to MIPI.
Revision table states Rev1.0 release dated 06/03/2024.
Several sheets specify 100 Ohm impedance for differential/LVDS/MGT signal groups.

evidence.claim: The source is an XDAQ block diagram/schematic document.
The XDAQ module uses an Artix-7 XC7A35-2FGG484 FPGA.

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified in the source text; authoritySignal is general.
Document metadata is inconsistent: revision table states Rev1.0 dated 06/03/2024, while sheet title blocks show Rev A and Rev B with 2025 dates.
No standards are cited in the source text.
The source appears to be an engineering schematic from a DHF path, not a formal RA/regulatory submission document.
